sentence: 地表温度在夏天可以高达六十度。
pinyin: Dìbiǎo wēndù zài xiàtiān kěyǐ gāodá liùshí dù.
english: Surface temperatures can reach sixty degrees Celsius in summer.

sentence: 他安于平淡的生活，从不羡慕别人。
pinyin: Tā ānyú píngdàn de shēnghuó, cóng bù xiànmù biérén.
english: He is content with a simple life and never envies others.

meaning: 1. immoderate; 2. excessive; 3. not knowing one's limits
sentence: 他喝酒无度，最终伤了身体。
pinyin: Tā hējiǔ wúdù, zuìzhōng shāngle shēntǐ.
english: His immoderate drinking eventually ruined his health.

sentence: 没有人能真正预见未来，除非是先知。
pinyin: Méiyǒu rén néng zhēnzhèng yùjiàn wèilái, chúfēi shì xiānzhī.
english: No one can truly foresee the future unless they are a prophet.

meaning: 1. door; 2. strategic gateway; 3. portal; 4. faction; 5. sect; 6. fami
sentence: 这个网站是当地最大的信息门户。
pinyin: Zhège wǎngzhàn shì dāngdì zuì dà de xìnxī ménhù.
english: This website is the largest local information portal.

meaning: 1. mutual; 2. interactive; 3. each other; 4. alternately; 5. in turn;
sentence: 这款应用的交互设计很直观易用。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn yìngyòng de jiāohù shèjì hěn zhíguān yìyòng.
english: The interaction design of this app is very intuitive and easy to use.

sentence: 导演昨晚改了脚本里的结局。
pinyin: Dǎoyǎn zuówǎn gǎile jiǎoběn lǐ de jiéjú.
english: The director changed the ending in the script last night.

sentence: 许多文化认为神性存在于自然之中。
pinyin: Xǔduō wénhuà rènwéi shénxìng cúnzài yú zìrán zhī zhōng.
english: Many cultures believe that divinity exists within nature.

meaning: 1. the northern part of the country; 2. the North
sentence: 北国的冬天寒冷而漫长。
pinyin: Běiguó de dōngtiān hánlěng ér màncháng.
english: Winter in the northern regions is cold and long.

meaning: 1. to annex; 2. to take over; 3. to acquire
sentence: 大公司兼并了这家小型科技公司。
pinyin: Dà gōngsī jiānbìngle zhè jiā xiǎoxíng kējì gōngsī.
english: The large company acquired this small tech firm.

sentence: 这道题考查的是线性方程的解法。
pinyin: Zhè dào tí kǎochá de shì xiànxìng fāngchéng de jiěfǎ.
english: This problem tests the method for solving linear equations.

sentence: 每个区块都记录了一批交易信息。
pinyin: Měi gè qūkuài dōu jìlùle yī pī jiāoyì xìnxī.
english: Each block records a batch of transaction information.

sentence: 这部词典由百名学者历时十年编纂完成。
pinyin: Zhè bù cídiǎn yóu bǎi míng xuézhě lìshí shí nián biānzuǎn wánchéng.
english: This dictionary was compiled by a hundred scholars over ten years.

meaning: 1. to quote a price; 2. quoted price; 3. quote
sentence: 供应商今天发来了最新的报价单。
pinyin: Gōngyìngshāng jīntiān fā lái le zuìxīn de bàojià dān.
english: The supplier sent over the latest price quote today.

meaning: main subject of long novel; true biography
sentence: 闲话少说，言归正传。
pinyin: Xiánhuà shǎo shuō, yán guī zhèngzhuàn.
english: Enough chit-chat — let's get back to the main topic.

sentence: 外电报道称双方已达成协议。
pinyin: Wàidiàn bàodào chēng shuāngfāng yǐ dáchéng xiéyì.
english: Reports from foreign news agencies say the two sides have reached an agreement.

meaning: highlight (in a photo or painting); (cosmetics) highlighter
sentence: 她在颧骨上打了一点高光，气色好多了。
pinyin: Tā zài quángǔ shàng dǎ le yīdiǎn gāoguāng, qìsè hǎo duō le.
english: She applied a little highlighter on her cheekbones and looked much more radiant.

meaning: adoptive mother (traditional adoption, i.e. without legal ramification
sentence: 他从小就认了邻居阿姨当干妈。
pinyin: Tā cóng xiǎo jiù rèn le línjū āyí dāng gànmā.
english: He has called the neighbor auntie his adoptive mother since he was little.

sentence: 公司的固定资产包括厂房和设备。
pinyin: Gōngsī de gùdìng zīchǎn bāokuò chǎngfáng hé shèbèi.
english: The company's fixed assets include the factory building and equipment.

sentence: 越来越多的人通过电子商务购物。
pinyin: Yuè lái yuè duō de rén tōng guò diàn zǐ shāng wù gòu wù.
english: More and more people shop through e-commerce.

sentence: 她负责公司新产品的行销工作。
pinyin: Tā fù zé gōng sī xīn chǎn pǐn de xíng xiāo gōng zuò.
english: She is responsible for marketing the company's new products.

meaning: the law; the law of the land; the law of a state (in former times); cr
sentence: 不管你是谁，都得遵守王法。
pinyin: Bù guǎn nǐ shì shuí, dōu děi zūn shǒu wáng fǎ.
english: No matter who you are, you have to abide by the law.

meaning: to run a newspaper; to publish a newspaper
sentence: 他年轻时就梦想着办报。
pinyin: Tā nián qīng shí jiù mèng xiǎng zhe bàn bào.
english: He dreamed of running a newspaper even when he was young.

meaning: letter of introduction; recommendation letter; reference
sentence: 他带着介绍信去新单位报到。
pinyin: Tā dài zhe jiè shào xìn qù xīn dān wèi bào dào.
english: He brought a letter of introduction when he checked in at his new workplace.

sentence: 这个月进项少，得省着花。
pinyin: Zhè ge yuè jìn xiàng shǎo, děi shěng zhe huā.
english: Income is low this month, so we need to spend carefully.

sentence: 这位学者研究国际主义理论多年。
pinyin: Zhè wèi xué zhě yán jiū guó jì zhǔ yì lǐ lùn duō nián.
english: This scholar has studied internationalism theory for many years.

sentence: 双方同意通过仲裁解决这场纠纷。
pinyin: Shuāngfāng tóngyì tōngguò zhòng cái jiějué zhè chǎng jiūfēn.
english: Both parties agreed to resolve the dispute through arbitration.

sentence: 小区里有一个室外游泳池。
pinyin: Xiǎoqū lǐ yǒu yī gè shìwài yóuyǒngchí.
english: There is an outdoor swimming pool in the residential complex.

sentence: 多坐公共交通可以减少二氧化碳排放。
pinyin: Duō zuò gōnggòng jiāotōng kěyǐ jiǎnshǎo èr yǎng huà tàn páifàng.
english: Taking public transport more often can reduce carbon dioxide emissions.

sentence: 客厅墙上挂着一幅风景油画。
pinyin: Kè tīng qiáng shàng guà zhe yī fú fēng jǐng yóu huà.
english: A landscape oil painting hangs on the living room wall.

sentence: 警察记下了肇事车辆的车牌号码。
pinyin: Jǐng chá jì xià le zhào shì chē liàng de chē pái hào mǎ.
english: The police wrote down the license plate number of the vehicle at fault.

sentence: 网上低价买到的东西质量不一定好。
pinyin: Wǎngshàng dī jià mǎi dào de dōngxi zhìliàng bù yīdìng hǎo.
english: Things bought online at a low price aren't necessarily good quality.

sentence: 我把课本忘在教室里了。
pinyin: Wǒ bǎ kè běn wàng zài jiàoshì lǐ le.
english: I left my textbook in the classroom.

sentence: 考试作弊是可耻的行为。
pinyin: Kǎoshì zuòbì shì kěchǐ de xíngwéi.
english: Cheating on an exam is shameful behavior.

meaning: 1. (astronomy) giant star; 2. (fig.) superstar (of opera, basketball e
sentence: 他是篮球界公认的巨星。
pinyin: Tā shì lánqiú jiè gōngrèn de jùxīng.
english: He is a universally recognized superstar in basketball.

meaning: 1. to provide (an asset) as security for a loan; 2. to put up collater
sentence: 他用房子抵押贷款来开公司。
pinyin: Tā yòng fángzi dǐyā dàikuǎn lái kāi gōngsī.
english: He used his house as collateral for a loan to start a company.

meaning: 1. funds; 2. a sum of money; 3. CL:宗[zōng]
sentence: 这笔款项将用于修建社区图书馆。
pinyin: Zhè bǐ kuǎn xiàng jiāng yòng yú xiū jiàn shè qū tú shū guǎn.
english: These funds will be used to build a community library.

meaning: service (work done for money); services (as in "goods and services")
sentence: 他通过提供劳务来赚取收入。
pinyin: Tā tōng guò tí gōng láo wù lái zuàn qǔ shōu rù.
english: He earns income by providing labor services.

meaning: (of a sound) to come forth; (of a sound source) to ring out; to sound;
sentence: 上课铃响起，同学们跑进教室。
pinyin: Shàng kè líng xiǎng qǐ, tóng xué men pǎo jìn jiào shì.
english: When the class bell rang out, the students ran into the classroom.

sentence: 你快点出门，要不然会迟到的。
pinyin: Nǐ kuài diǎn chūmén, yàobùrán huì chídào de.
english: You should leave soon, otherwise you'll be late.

sentence: 他花了一整天剪辑这段旅行视频。
pinyin: Tā huāle yī zhěng tiān jiǎnjí zhè duàn lǚxíng shìpín.
english: He spent a whole day editing this travel video.

sentence: 健康的性生活对夫妻关系有积极影响。
pinyin: Jiànkāng de xìngshēnghuó duì fūqī guānxi yǒu jījí yǐngxiǎng.
english: A healthy sex life has a positive impact on a couple's relationship.

sentence: 这条街的旧名叫做和平路。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo jiē de jiùmíng jiào zuò Hépíng Lù.
english: The former name of this street was Heping Road.

sentence: 两国之间存在广泛的共同利益。
pinyin: Liǎng guó zhījiān cúnzài guǎngfàn de gòngtóng lìyì.
english: There are extensive common interests between the two countries.

sentence: 教宗在梵蒂冈向信众发表了讲话。
pinyin: Jiàozōng zài Fàndìgāng xiàng xìnzhòng fābiǎole jiǎnghuà.
english: The pope addressed the faithful in Vatican City.

meaning: 1. think tank; 2. group of talented people
sentence: 政府参考了几家知名智库的研究报告。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ cānkǎole jǐ jiā zhīmíng zhìkù de yánjiū bàogào.
english: The government consulted research reports from several well-known think tanks.

sentence: 武警在博物馆门口站岗。
pinyin: Wǔjǐng zài bówùguǎn ménkǒu zhàngǎng.
english: Armed police are standing guard at the museum entrance.

sentence: 这个地区用核电供暖和发电。
pinyin: Zhège dìqū yòng hédiàn gōngnuǎn hé fādiàn.
english: This area uses nuclear power for heating and electricity.

sentence: 他花了十年写这部史诗。
pinyin: Tā huāle shí nián xiě zhè bù shǐshī.
english: He spent ten years writing this epic poem.

meaning: 1. to use as an excuse; 2. on the pretext; 3. excuse; 4. pretext; 5. a
sentence: 他以身体不舒服为藉口请假。
pinyin: Tā yǐ shēntǐ bù shūfu wéi jièkǒu qǐngjià.
english: He used feeling unwell as an excuse to ask for leave.
